atomic_facts.fact: Four columns of graphics labeled I, II, III, and IV are displayed.
The graphics for I and IV are blue, while II and III are white.
The icons below the numerals vary: I and III show spirals, II shows a dot, and IV shows a plain curve.
A blurred person is visible in the background behind the graphics.
